features: Compatibility -The tempered glass screen protector for iPhone 17 Pro Max (6.9 inches)

Ultra-Clear - The iPhone 17 Pro Max Screen Protector designed with high-definition transparency, it ensures your display stays sharp and vibrant, just like the original screen, whether you're streaming videos, gaming, or browsing. Great for who demand the best visual quality while keeping their device protected

Military-Grade Drop Protection & Scratch Resistance -The screen protector iPhone 17 Pro Max compliant with US military standard. Made with 9H hardness tempered glass, it absorbs shocks from drops to protect your phone and resists scratches from keys, coins, and more

Auto-Dust Removal & Easy Installation - The iPhone 17 Pro Max glass screen protector is super easily installation, just 2 simple steps, cover and pull, even beginners can easily apply it. Auto-dust removal, use static electricity to pull dust away from the screen, minimizing the possibility of air bubbles

High Sensitivity & Oleophobic Coating - The thickness of the iPhone 17 promax screen protector is approximately 0.33 mm, which is ultra-thin. Smooth touch and high sensitivity for seamless typing, and gaming. The oleophobic coating to anti-fingerprints, smudges and oils resistant, keeping your screen clean and clear
